users.description: Manage user accounts and system roles
users.emptyDescription: Click "Add User" to create a new one.
users.resetPasswordMessage: Password for {fullName} will be reset — the old password will no longer work and the user must change it on first login.
users.createErrorMessage: Failed to create user. Please try again.
users.updateErrorMessage: Failed to update user. Please try again.

form.usernameInvalid: Only letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens
form.phoneNumberHelper: Format 08xxxxxxxxxx — can be used to login instead of username
form.areaAssignmentHelper: Leave empty for ad-hoc workers or management roles.
form.shiftHelper: One shift per worker (applies to all their areas)
form.passwordInfo: A temporary password will be generated automatically and shown once after the user is created. The user must change it on first login.

areas.emptyDescription: Start by adding your first work area.
areas.noWorkersDescription: No workers have been assigned to this area yet.
areas.noWorkersManageDescription: Assign workers to this area or create a work schedule.
areas.createErrorMessage: Failed to create area. Please try again.
areas.updateErrorMessage: Failed to update area. Please try again.

form.name: Area Name
form.boundaryPlaceholder: Paste GeoJSON polygon for area boundary
form.boundaryDescription: Two separate settings: draw the area boundary, then set a location pin — e.g., office location, entrance, or search result point used to pan the map. The location pin is auto-filled from the boundary centroid only if not yet set; redrawing the boundary does not change an existing pin. Drag the pin, search for an address, or press the locate button to adjust. (Map click only adds points when drawing the boundary.)
form.mapUnavailable: Map is not available — area boundary cannot be drawn without Google Maps.
form.geometryRequired: Set at least one: draw the area boundary or place a location pin.

areas.assignWorkerHelper: Only field workers and security. For work schedules, use the Schedule menu.
areas.deleteConfirmation: You will delete the area {areaName}. This action cannot be undone.

listSheet.title: Area
listSheet.count: {count} area{query, select, empty { of {total}} other { of {total}}}

areas.detailNotFound: The area you are looking for was not found or has been deleted.

rayons.emptyDescription: Start by adding your first rayon.
rayons.createErrorMessage: Failed to create rayon. Please try again.
rayons.updateErrorMessage: Failed to update rayon. Please try again.

form.name: Rayon Name
form.head: Rayon Head
form.colorHelper: Pick from the palette or enter a hexadecimal code (optional). Used for rayon boundaries on the monitoring map.
form.boundaryDescription: Two separate settings — set at least one: draw the rayon boundary, and/or set a location pin (e.g., rayon office location or point used to pan the map during search). The location pin does not need to be at the boundary center.
form.geometryRequired: Set at least one: draw the rayon boundary or place a location pin.

shared.deleteConfirmation: You will delete {name}. This action cannot be undone.
shared.rayonHasAreas: Rayon "{name}" still has areas. Please delete the areas first.

tempPassword.title: Temporary Password
tempPassword.messageWithUsername: Give this password to {username}. Displayed once only — the user must change it on first login.
tempPassword.messageWithoutUsername: This password is displayed once only — the user must change it on first login.

deleteUser.title: Delete User
deleteUser.descriptionPrefix: Are you sure you want to delete user

messages.userCreateFailed: Failed to create user. Please try again.
messages.userUpdateFailed: Failed to update user. Please try again.

boundary.locationNotFound: Location not found. Try other keywords.
boundary.invalidKml: Invalid KML/GeoJSON — no boundary polygon found.
boundary.multiPartWarning: Boundary consists of {count} parts — vertex edit disabled. Use "Redraw boundary" to replace it with a single polygon.
boundary.drawingHint: Click on map to add points. Click "Finish" (min. 3 points) or double-click to end.
boundary.placingPinHint: Click on map to place location pin (can be repeated). Press "Finish placing" when done.
boundary.noBoundaryHint: Press "Draw boundary" to start drawing a polygon.
boundary.exploreHint: Pan/search the map or use location control (bottom right) to explore. Press "Place/Change location pin" to place the pin; the pin can also be dragged.
